display_name: Open Notebook — Privacy-First Research & Synthesis Platform
description: Open-source alternative to Google NotebookLM. Agents có thể quản lý multi-notebooks, import PDF/YouTube/web/audio, chạy AI conversation grounded vào documents, generate podcasts, flashcards, quizzes. Hỗ trợ 16+ AI providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama, local LLMs). Best for: research synthesis, document QA, tutorial creation, learning content generation.
author: lfnovo
use_cases: Import và synthesize 300+ repos từ Google Sheets
Generate learning tutorials từ knowledge base
Podcast + flashcard generation từ AI OS knowledge
notes: Self-hosted NotebookLM alternative. Run: pip install -r requirements.txt && python -m open_notebook. Web UI at localhost:8080. Hỗ trợ Ollama cho local inference. Primary tool cho R&D research synthesis pipeline.
